/usr/bin/ar qc libtrading_engine.a CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/domain/Order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/domain/Trade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/domain/OrderBook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/domain/ExecutionReport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/domain/MatchingEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/config/EngineConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/config/ServiceConfig.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtrading_engine.a
